title: アルゼンチン共和国杯の後に・とどけ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What a powerful performance! And the winner of
the Copa Republica Argentina is...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Yesss!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (Wait... Aren't there like... senior runners here?)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That means I can actually hold my own... I'm, like,
on fire!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I could even...

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaay, Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! What did we just watch? How did
she get so freaking good?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's right! Our girl is a real powerhouse!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
We can't let her leave us behind! Time to train
like there's no tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text: JORDAAAN! You go, girl!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Aha... ahaha! So loud!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Inhale...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm just getting started! I'm gonna go even higher!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna make it even bigger! Next stop, the...
the, uh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So yeah, I'm counting on ya. It's a pretty huge
G1, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following her big announcement at the
racecourse, Tosen Jordan brings up the Arima
Kinen with me in the most casual tone.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I already said I'd do it, so now I've gotta,
right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I wanna show the girls just how cool I can be.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
We'll want your toenails to make a full recovery
first.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! You're kidding, right?! I thought they were
already healed!

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
These things take time. Still, your efforts over the
past six months are plain to see.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, it shouldn't get any worse. As
long as you let it continue to heal, you'll make a
full recovery.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Really?

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but that doesn't mean you should let your
guard down. Please make sure to take good care
of her, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Of course. I want her to make a full recovery.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Heh... wow.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Things are actually going pretty well. Now I just
have to win the Arima and we're gucci.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A week later, one rumor in particular is making
the rounds among the trainers.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
It's all about the Tiara tour this year. I hear there's
one runner who already has international races in
her sights.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. If I were to say who the strongest runner is
currently, it'd have to be someone from the Tiara
tour...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I don't know about the strongest in general. Don't
forget who we're about to see in the Arima.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
True, the field is basically a who's who in racing at
this point. I guess we'll see who's really the
strongest at the Arima.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We got a meteor touchdown tomorrow... Looks
like it's fixin' to be a stellar showdown.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: It's all over... I should call my mom...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Welcome! ☆ We'll be guiding one lucky individual
to Mars! ♪ The boarding gate is that tire right
over there! ♪

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Cut it out! What're you trying to pull?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Tell me the value of pi! 3.1415926535... and
what's next?!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: ...H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Too slow! How are you supposed to fend off the
Turfians' attack like that?! Next trainer, you're up!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: The heck's going on?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Incredibly stupid, more like. She's so extra.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But every time she races, she's always the favorite
or at least second. I don't get it...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Anyone who can't solve the problem, hit the tire!
I'll let you use my custom hammer!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hammer training is an effective method for
building muscle, but it's unclear why she's
involving other people like this.
choice_data_list:
Maybe there's a deeper meaning to her
actions...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Is this like a weird habit of yours? You're always
trying to tie everything in with training. I think
your brain might legit be broken.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
There's no deeper meaning. It's just Golshi being
Golshi.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, I need to focus! I gotta keep
my eyes on the Arima Kinen!
choice_data_list: The Arima Kinen is going to be a tough fight.
The Arima Kinen is going to be a tough fight.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I know, I know. But I can do it, right? I mean...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You saw how I ran in the Copa Republica
Argentina! I can hold my own against seniors!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
We can at least see if I'm in the running. Like,
take a look at this fan poll.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm twenty-eighth right now! Isn't that wild? I only
just announced I wanted to run the other day.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That means people are already expecting big
things of me. I could even be number one by the
time of the race.
choice_data_list: But the difference between G1 and G2 is p—

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text:
Jordan! We decided on a place for the Arima
after-party! Check the group chat!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well, we've made it this far somehow. All we can
do is try our best, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She says that so nonchalantly.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's up to you to figure out how we do that. And
as for me...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm... just a dummy. That means it's all up to you!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Check this out! It's a list of all the runners in
the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah. It's all anyone's talking about. It's an
impressive lineup, right? ...Ah, there's a name that
takes me back.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan! She was a hot topic back in the
Satsuki Sho, wasn't she?

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, from like six months ago? Forget about her,
my fave is running! You know her, right? She's—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...One month left until the Arima Kinen.
